document.title: 1320 S3 Vibration Level Mapping Table v2
document.module: S3 Soul Vibration / 灵魂振动
document.purpose: Official mapping table for converting S3_raw = birth_month × birth_day into S3 vibration tier codes.

positioning.description: S3 is the Soul Vibration layer. It reflects how a user's energy expresses, matures, stabilizes, or seeks grounding.
positioning.disclaimer: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

calculation.mapping_behavior: Find the tier whose inclusive range contains S3_raw, then return its S3 code.

critical_implementation_note.note: The source S3 tier table includes ranges up to 500+, but the current S3_raw formula birth_month × birth_day can only produce values from 1 to 372 for valid Gregorian dates. Therefore S3-10, S3-11, and S3-12 are not reachable under the current formula unless future formula extensions introduce a higher raw value.
critical_implementation_note.production_rule: NOVA must follow this mapping exactly and must not guess or remap S3 tiers.

tiers.soul_traits_zh: 初生能量、灵魂幼化、敏感度高、容易受外界影响。渴望安全感与稳定结构。
tiers.strengths_zh: 纯净、直觉干净、学习速度快、对真理有原始的接收能力。
tiers.challenges_zh: 容易依赖、害怕被否定、频率不稳定、情绪容易被带走。
tiers.guidance_zh: 建立内在安全感，练习觉知情绪，不急着跨越阶段；允许自己是一颗种子，慢慢生长。
tiers.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

tiers.soul_traits_zh: 内心开始出现觉醒火花，对灵性、真理、意义有强烈好奇心。
tiers.strengths_zh: 灵感强、直觉频繁爆发、行动力上升、容易产生突破点。
tiers.challenges_zh: 频繁否定自己、害怕走错路、反复陷入二元判断、容易被他人影响。
tiers.guidance_zh: 练习辨识动机，区分小我冲动与灵魂推动，让每一次灵感都经过觉知过滤。
tiers.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

tiers.soul_traits_zh: 进入探索阶段，开始学习不同体系、方法、智慧。
tiers.strengths_zh: 开放、包容、学习能力强、愿意尝试。
tiers.challenges_zh: 容易迷失、体系混乱、追求“更多”导致分散。
tiers.guidance_zh: 练习稳定中心，选择一条路深入，不再被“外面更多东西”吸走。
tiers.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

tiers.soul_traits_zh: 灵魂觉醒正在显化，开始看破幻相、理解能量逻辑。
tiers.strengths_zh: 看见真相、洞察力变强、内在力量开始显现。
tiers.challenges_zh: 容易傲慢、容易评判他人、过度强调觉醒而忽略生活落地。
tiers.guidance_zh: 觉醒不是优越，觉醒是服务。让觉醒回到生活中，用真理照亮最平凡的地方。
tiers.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

tiers.soul_traits_zh: 灵魂开始整合：情绪、关系、创伤、阴影。
tiers.strengths_zh: 稳定、成熟、开始拥有智慧的力量。
tiers.challenges_zh: 面对旧伤旧课题时会想逃避；害怕再次受伤。
tiers.guidance_zh: 整合来自温柔，而不是强迫；让每一次情绪都成为练习。
tiers.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

tiers.soul_traits_zh: 拥有转化能力，可以将痛变力量、将困境变智慧。
tiers.strengths_zh: 强大的内在炼金术、深刻的洞察力、清晰的直觉方向。
tiers.challenges_zh: 容易独自承担太多、倾向压抑情绪、太早承担救赎角色。
tiers.guidance_zh: 不需要承担所有人的转化；学习界限，让力量自然流动。
tiers.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

tiers.soul_traits_zh: 灵魂开始拥有使命感、愿景、方向性。
tiers.strengths_zh: 创造力强、看得远、能带领他人、灵魂光度提升。
tiers.challenges_zh: 容易焦虑“还不够好”、使命过度膨胀、小我悄悄混进来。
tiers.guidance_zh: 放下对结果的执着，让愿景成为服务而不是证明。
tiers.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

tiers.soul_traits_zh: 灵魂进入疗愈频率，与他人连接时带来修复与启发。
tiers.strengths_zh: 强同理心、稳定存在、自然给予安全感。
tiers.challenges_zh: 情绪共感过度、能量被吸走、吸收他人痛苦。
tiers.guidance_zh: 让疗愈从界限开始，不吸收，只陪伴，不拯救。
tiers.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

tiers.soul_traits_zh: 灵魂具有传递智慧的能力，影响他人意识。
tiers.strengths_zh: 语言有力量、能量稳定、智慧成熟、引导清晰。
tiers.challenges_zh: 容易过度负责、容易疲惫、容易变成精神依赖对象。
tiers.guidance_zh: 智慧不是让别人依赖你，而是让别人回到自己。
tiers.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

tiers.soul_traits_zh: 灵魂高度自觉，生活、言语、存在本身就是教学。
tiers.strengths_zh: 觉知稳定、智慧深、影响力高、频率强。
tiers.challenges_zh: 面对集体无明时容易感到孤独；容易觉得无人理解。
tiers.guidance_zh: 继续做光，而不是做领袖。光只是照亮，不判断、不期待。
tiers.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

tiers.soul_traits_zh: 灵魂开始超越个人层次，进入服务集体、服务意识的阶段。
tiers.strengths_zh: 自然散发高频能量、能迅速提升场域、具有安定力量。
tiers.challenges_zh: 身体承载压力大、能量消耗高、偶尔出现灵魂疲惫感。
tiers.guidance_zh: 回到身体、回到休息、回到自我滋养，才能继续承载更大的频率。
tiers.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

tiers.soul_traits_zh: 灵魂成为“源头的通道”，没有小我的干扰，纯粹以智慧、爱与真理运作。
tiers.strengths_zh: 频率最纯净、觉知最稳定、言语即力量、存在即光。
tiers.challenges_zh: 必须持续保持空性，不可执着“成为高频”，否则会跌回低阶。
tiers.guidance_zh: 不住于相，不住于我，以无为之心继续让真理流过你。
tiers.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

worked_examples.note: This corrects the earlier temporary assumption of S3-08.
This is the highest reachable S3 tier under the current birth_month × birth_day formula.
